hypertension.tip: Request sauce on the side. Skip chilli sauce. Ask for less gravy.

hyperlipidaemia.tip: Choose steamed over roasted. Limit skin intake.

diabetes.tip: Ask for less rice. Add extra cucumber for fibre.

hypertension.tip: Coconut rice + ikan bilis is high sodium. Skip the fried anchovies.

hyperlipidaemia.tip: Coconut milk is high in saturated fat. Skip fried chicken; pick the cucumber.

diabetes.tip: Coconut rice spikes blood sugar. Halve the rice, add veg.

hypertension.tip: Broth is very high sodium. Ask for soup separate, drink less of it.

hyperlipidaemia.tip: Low fat. Pick soup over dry (no lard/sauce).

diabetes.tip: Choose kway teow or more fishballs, less noodles.

hypertension.tip: Dark sauce + lard = very high sodium. Share a plate.

hyperlipidaemia.tip: Fried in lard. Ask for less oil, skip the cockles' fat.

diabetes.tip: High GI flat noodles + sweet sauce. Limit portion.

hypertension.tip: Ask for no salt added and skip the evaporated milk.

hyperlipidaemia.tip: Lean fish, low fat. Skip the fried fish version.

diabetes.tip: High protein, low GI. A solid everyday choice.

hyperlipidaemia.tip: Condensed milk adds saturated fat. Ask for less milk.

diabetes.tip: Very high sugar. Order 'teh tarik siu dai' (less sweet) or kosong.
Ask for no syrup or 'kosong' to keep sugar low.
